title: Fermented Indian Rice Stick Noodles Stir-fry
description: A dense and crowd-pleasing Indian dish featuring fermented rice stick noodles as the star ingredient, combined with Mediterranean-friendly flavors for a perfect accompaniment to any meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds and let them sizzle for about 30 seconds.
Add finely chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Toss in red chili peppers and continue to stir-fry until they start to soften, approximately 2-3 minutes.
Increase heat to medium and add tomato slices. Cook until tomatoes are soft and released their juices.
Season with coriander powder and garam masala. Stir well to combine.
Transfer the mixture onto a serving dish.
Divide evenly among plates or bowls and serve immediately.
